name: Wanderer Mantle
description: There are mages who make a living by wandering the world, offering their services to anyone willing to pay. Most of them suffer a miserable fate: some die after taking on a contract they can't handle, some join brigand gangs, while others fall victim to the mob, which is quick to act upon its prejudice.
descriptionZh: 有些法师云游四方，谁愿意出钱请他们帮忙，他们就替谁办事，以此谋生。这种行者法师最终的境地多数都不是很好——有的接自己搞不定的契据，死了；有的成了土匪；有的则因为偏见，死在了暴民手中。
